features: Redesigned Admin Guards page into a full command-center layout
Added KPI row: Total Guards, Online Now, On Patrol, Off Duty, Pending Approval, Alerts
Added guard search and filters for status, duty status, rank, and approval status
Added guard roster table with guard identity, rank, status, current assignment, GPS update, message count, response time, and actions
Added selected guard right rail with profile header, current location, assignment, shift status, phone/email, mini live-location map, recent activity, and certifications
Added working actions for Message, View Route, Assign Patrol, View Profile, refresh, clear filters, pagination, and rows per page
Online/offline status uses existing GPS online logic and does not treat approved guard accounts as online by default
